message:
feat(web): Add View Transitions API support for smooth navigation

Implement View Transitions API for same-document navigation with:
- useViewTransition hook with browser support detection and reduced motion handling
- ViewTransitionLink component wrapping Next.js Link with transition support
- CSS animations for fade/slide transitions in globals.css
- Nav.tsx updated to use ViewTransitionLink for all navigation

The implementation uses native TypeScript 5.9 types for the View Transitions API
and includes proper fallback handling for unsupported browsers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
